description_long: This is a round pepperoni pizza resting on a metallic pizza tray with two small handles on opposite sides. The pizza features a golden-brown, thin crust and is topped with evenly distributed slices of pepperoni over a layer of melted cheese. The cheese appears slightly browned and bubbly, with a subtle blend of orange and yellow hues. The pizza tray is metallic gray, circular, and has a low rim, providing support and ease of handling. No visible cut lines are present, indicating the pizza is whole and uncut. There are no visible brand markings or packaging elements on the pizza or tray.
description: A whole pepperoni pizza with a golden thin crust and melted cheese, served on a round metal tray with handles.
description_view_0: Top-down view showing the full pizza with pepperoni slices and the circular metal tray.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thin crust and both tray handles, with pepperoni and cheese visible.
description_view_2: Top-down view similar to view 0, showing the pizza's toppings and tray rim.
description_view_3: Angled side view from the opposite side, showing the tray handles and the pizza's thin profile.
